targets.expr: sum by (scenario) (ydb_workload_countError{application=~"$application", scenario=~"$scenario"}) / (sum by (scenario) (ydb_workload_rps{application=~"$application", scenario=~"$scenario", statut="ok"}) + sum by (scenario) (ydb_workload_countError{application=~"$application", scenario=~"$scenario"}))
